title: Tomahawk
description: Add a Cyberpunk axe to Minecraft!
body:
# **Cyberpunk Tomahawk** - **To obtain it, rename any axe on the anvil "Tomahawk". Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** ### !!!Attention, this model is included in [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyberpack)!!! ![Tomahawk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oQppO87Y/images/11e507c1bcbb81b17eb51284f8d0ec3871b8ca41.png) ![axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oQppO87Y/images/4536649b0c1ab79c2e27491a2b3e446e44740080.png) ![axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oQppO87Y/images/b401c8d8249aeee814f2b90d0a2bdc0cdbacfd61.png) # **Social**

# **Support the project**
